ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as a strict guard but also shows understanding of the situation. Naturalness could be improved with less formal language.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: While consistent in tone, lacks immediate context relevance and naturalness as it doesn't address the urgency or specific situation at hand.
